word: G2510 - καθάπτω - katháptō - kath-ap'-to - Fasten on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καθάπτω

- Transliteration: Kathapto

- Phonetic: kath-ap'-to

- Definition:

1. to fit or fasten to, bind on

2. to lay hold of, fasten on (hostilely)

- Origin: from G2596 and G680

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G680; to seize upon: - fasten on.
